name: Google Flights
description: Google's flight search service for comparing fares, schedules, and routes across airlines worldwide.

years.notes: Vectorized from the 1024x1024 raster served by gstatic.com (referenced from the <link rel="icon"> on https://www.google.com/travel/flights). Google Flights kept the 2016 Material long-shadow product icon through the 2020 Workspace refresh — light-blue circle with a darker diagonal top-right band, light-cyan rim along the bottom, and a white Material 'flight' airplane glyph rotated 30 degrees clockwise with a soft drop shadow.
